title: hieracium levicaule subsp. tersiflorum
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. tersiflorum is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), specifically a subspecies of Hieracium levicaule, which is a type of hawkweed. The medicinal properties of Hieracium levicaule subsp. tersiflorum are attributed to its leaves, roots, and flowers, which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant, although further research is needed to confirm these effects. Hieracium levicaule subsp. tersiflorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which may be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy lifestyle.
